name: @radzor/push-notification
description: Send push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) or Apple Push Notification service (APNs).

inputs.name: fcmServerKey
inputs.description: FCM server key from Firebase console. Required for FCM provider.

inputs.name: apnsKeyId
inputs.description: APNs key ID. Required for APNs provider.

inputs.name: apnsTeamId
inputs.description: Apple Developer Team ID. Required for APNs provider.

inputs.name: apnsPrivateKey
inputs.description: APNs private key PEM string. Required for APNs provider.

outputs.name: pushResult
outputs.description: Result of the push notification delivery attempt.

events.name: onSent
events.description: Fired when a notification is successfully sent.

actions.name: sendToDevice

params.name: notification
params.type: { title: string; body: string; data?: Record<string, string> }

actions.description: Send a push notification to a single device.

actions.name: sendToTopic

params.name: notification
params.type: { title: string; body: string; data?: Record<string, string> }

actions.description: Send a push notification to a topic (FCM only).
